title: My Gun is the Law
writer: Alfonso Brescia, Franco Cobianchi, Ramón Comas
actors: Ángel del Pozo, Luciana Gilli, Miguel de la Riva
plot: The town of San Felipe is plagued by robberies. Two Federal Agents are sent to investigate the major suspect, a local landowner. One agent works on his ranch, the other becomes his daughter's fiance.
